response_raw:
{
"mode": "human",
"topic": "How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.",
"opinion": "To manage and deal with fake content on social media, it is essential to be mindful of the sources of information and verify the authenticity of posts before sharing them. Users should also be cautious when engaging with unknown accounts or profiles that may be spreading misinformation. Additionally, using fact-checking websites and reputable news sources can help individuals separate fact from fiction on social media platforms. Furthermore, social media platforms themselves have implemented measures to detect and remove fake content, so it is important to use these features when available. Ultimately, a combination of critical thinking, skepticism, and diligence in verifying information can help users navigate the complex landscape of social media and avoid falling prey to misinformation."
